word: G1913 - ἐπιβιβάζω - epibibázō - ep-ee-bee-bad'-zo - Set on

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπιβιβάζω

- Transliteration: Epibibazo

- Phonetic: ep-ee-bee-bad'-zo

- Definition:

1. to cause to mount

2. to place upon

- Origin: from G1909 and a redupl. deriv. of the base of G939 [cf G307]

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and a reduplicated derivation of the base of G939 (compare G307); to cause to mount (an animal): - set on.
